title: 8 Things Humility Actually Does
caption:
Most men think humility is weakness. They've never met a truly humble man.

A humble man doesn't need to win every argument. Doesn't have to be the loudest. Doesn't collapse when someone questions him — because his identity isn't on loan from his reputation.

"God opposes the proud but gives grace to the humble." — James 4:6. That's not a compliment on meekness. That's a description of who He works through.

Save this for the man who thinks humility is something he has to become before God will use him. God starts with humble men. Always has.

#faith #christianmen #humility #godlymen #manofgod #christianity #scripture #character
